message:
feat(demo): expand showcase screens with rich interactive examples

Significantly enhance demo-showcase with more comprehensive examples
demonstrating ftui capabilities.

app.rs:
- Add navigation state management for screen transitions
- Implement command palette integration in demo app
- Add keyboard shortcut hints in status bar

dashboard.rs (+800 lines):
- Add live system metrics visualization (CPU, memory, network)
- Implement sparkline charts with historical data
- Add responsive grid layout adapting to terminal size
- Include interactive widget gallery section

code_explorer.rs (+500 lines):
- Add syntax-highlighted code viewer with line numbers
- Implement file tree navigation with keyboard controls
- Add search/filter functionality within files
- Include git status indicators in file tree

shakespeare.rs (+300 lines):
- Expand text rendering demo with more formatting options
- Add scroll position indicator
- Implement text search highlighting
- Add font style toggles (bold, italic, underline)

markdown_rich_text.rs:
- Minor formatting adjustments for consistency
- Fix edge case in nested list rendering

These demos serve as both documentation and integration tests for
ftui's widget and layout systems.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
